title: Time for adventure
description: I created this modpack for friends that love to explore with mild ARPG elements. There is an emphasis on mods that add more structures, POIs (points of interest) and enhance vanilla game play.
body:
Have you ever wanted to just explore and wander the world? Or have you ever wanted to go on daring adventures and be challenged with the unexpected? If you said yes to either of these questions, then it's "Time for adventure" and this modpack 📦 is for you! 

In an effort to maximize exploration, we've collected a number of mods to help players have a more nomadic and exciting experience from the beginning. You start off with everything you need to immediately go on an adventure. Including a Donkey, Saddle, sword and shield, backpack, and some bread. Because its dangerous to go unprepared.

📋 Over 280+ mods

🌅 Beautiful Shaders to choose from

⛰️ Expansive terrain generation to experience

⛏️ Explore the depths and carve out mountains

🎒 Using backpacks bring your valuables and more importantly your loot with you 

🏴‍☠️ Take to the skies while on daring adventures with blimps and planes

⚒️ Expand your skills using the talent tree

⚔️ Fight challenging mobs and bosses
